sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root רָמָה Pi. to. deceive).-

(1) fraud, Gen 27:35 34:13 . אִישׁ מִרְמָה a fraudulent man, Psa 5:7. אַבְנֵי מִרְמה fraudulent weights, i.e. made to deceive, Mic 6:11. מאֹזְנֵי מִרְמָה deceptive scales, Pro 11:1. Meton. riches gained by fraud, Jer 5:27. Plur. מִרְמֹות Psa 10:7 35:20 .

(2) [Mirma], pr.n. m., 1Ch 8:10.
